desc:
The Crater in Fallout 76 is a large Raider settlement built within the wreckage of a crashed space station located in the Toxic Valley. It was established by Caleb Fischer and his crew and is led by Meg Groberg, a former member of the Diehards Raider faction. The settlement serves as the headquarters for the Crater Raiders and is a key location in the Wastelanders update, which introduces both the Raiders and Settlers factions.
Grid F9 (X: 2232, Y: 3444)
